title: The Cess and Other Taxes on Minerals (Validation) Act, 1992
full_text: The Cess and Other Taxes on Minerals (Validation) Act, 1992 खनिजों पर उपकर और अन्‍य कर (विधिमान्‍यकरण) अधिनियम, 1992 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1992-16 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 1992-04-04 Act Year: 1992 Short Title: The Cess and Other Taxes on Minerals (Validation) Act, 1992 Hindi Title: खनिजों पर उपकर और अन्‍य कर (विधिमान्‍यकरण) अधिनियम, 1992 Long Title: An Act to validate the imposition and collection of cesses and certain other taxes on minerals under certain State laws. Ministry: Ministry of Mines Enforcement Date: 15-02-1992 Schedule 1. Section 2. Validation of certain State laws and actions taken and things done thereunder. Section 3. Repeal and savings. Schedule 1.
